title: Daikin India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Daikin India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Daikin India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Daikin India:
Daikin India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Daikin India!
